bugs_fixed_to_unblock_ai_path: aiProcessor.ts pointed at Vertex AI (aiplatform.googleapis.com) which requires OAuth, not API key — switched to generativelanguage.googleapis.com
Response parser only handled snake_case (inline_data/mime_type); live endpoint returns camelCase — accept both
Metro cache had stale env-var inlining; cleared and rebuilt
Playwright raced past AI completion because verdict badge was already visible from prior call — wait on spinner appear/disappear + compare-toggle visibility instead
Image-gen prompt rewritten to enforce identity preservation + pure white background

screens.requirement: Picker landing with two clear CTAs (Take Photo, Choose from Library), supported-formats info, no upsell
screens.evidence: Bold 'Select Your Photo' headline, Take Photo (black) + Choose from Library (outline), 'SUPPORTED FORMATS: JPG, PNG' footer in tracked typography. No subscription nag.

screens.requirement: Country list (US/EU/CN) + paper size toggle + live photos-per-sheet count + Check Compliance CTA
screens.evidence: '15 photos per US Letter (3 x 5)' with US default selected. EU/Schengen and China cards visible with mm dims. US Letter paper chip selected, A4 also tappable. 'Check Compliance' CTA at the bottom.

screens.requirement: Real Gemini verdict against country rules, severity badge, codified issues with codes + plain-language messages + concrete remediations, action CTAs
screens.evidence: Live verdict from gemini-2.5-flash-lite (200 OK). WARNINGS badge. Summary 'The background is not plain white and has some shadows.' Issues: BG_NOT_WHITE ('Stand in front of a plain white or light wall'), SHADOW_ON_BG ('Step a foot or two away from the wall behind you'). Auto-fix with AI (blue) + Continue to Preview (black).

screens.requirement: After clicking Auto-fix, the photo has been REPLACED by an AI-generated version visibly different from the input, AFTER chip overlay, 'View original' link visible
screens.evidence: Live image-gen call to gemini-2.5-flash-image returned a PNG (200 OK; C2PA manifest header confirms Gemini provenance). On-screen photo now shows a noticeably cleaner near-white background vs. the input's off-white-with-shadows. Identity preserved. AFTER chip top-left. 'View original' link below the photo. Auto re-check ran (3rd Gemini call) and surfaces residual BG_NOT_UNIFORM — honest about imperfection.

screens.requirement: BEFORE chip overlay, original photo shown, 'View AI-enhanced' link
screens.evidence: Toggle clicked once — photo swapped back to the original input (visible off-white background restored). BEFORE chip top-left. Link reads 'View AI-enhanced'.

screens.requirement: AFTER chip overlay, AI-enhanced photo shown, 'View original' link
screens.evidence: Toggle clicked again — photo swapped back to the AI-enhanced version. AFTER chip top-left. Link reads 'View original'.

screens.requirement: Printable sheet: 15 tiles of the AI-enhanced photo, cut-line guides visible, all 4 export actions
screens.evidence: 3x5 grid (15 tiles) of the AI-ENHANCED photo (not the input). `+` cut-line corner ticks at every tile. 'United States -- 51 x 51 mm' info bar. '15 photos per sheet (US Letter)' count. Four action buttons: Print Now (blue accent), Save as PDF, Save to Photos, Share PNG.

screens.requirement: Cut-line toggle visibly changes the preview (ticks gone)
screens.evidence: Same 15-tile sheet with cut-line corner ticks removed. Checkbox unchecked. Toggle has visible effect.

screens.requirement: Printable popup opens with photos tiled at correct paper dimensions + bold cut marks; uses the AI-enhanced photo
screens.evidence: New tab with 3x5 tiled AI-enhanced photos on a white sheet. Dark 1pt corner cut ticks at every tile. No browser chrome bleeding into the sheet — ready to print on US Letter.
